$schema: Suno track generation config for phase.rs audio theme

theme.name: Planeswalker
theme.author: phase.rs (AI-generated via Suno)
theme.description: Epic fantasy orchestral soundtrack inspired by collectible card game dueling

globalDefaults.persona: Use Hall of the Planeswalkers as persona to lock in orchestral style

tracks.title: Hall of the Planeswalkers
tracks.style: ALREADY GENERATED — this is the persona source track
tracks.label: Hall of the Planeswalkers
tracks.notes: Done. Used as persona for all other tracks.

tracks.title: Between the Planes
tracks.style: quieter and more reflective, like wandering through an ancient library at dusk, soft piano leading, strings gently swelling underneath, slow and contemplative, spacious and dreamlike
tracks.label: Between the Planes
tracks.notes: Alternate menu track. More subdued, reflective. For players who've been on the menu a while.

tracks.title: The Artificer's Workshop
tracks.style: very minimal and calm, background music for quiet focus, gentle ambient warmth, sparse soft notes with lots of space between them, slow tempo, unobtrusive, like the hum of a warm room while you think
tracks.label: The Artificer's Workshop
tracks.notes: Deck building/collection browsing. Curious, intellectual, unhurried.

tracks.title: Tome of Strategies
tracks.style: quiet and unhurried, a single soft instrument at a time, long sustained notes, lots of silence, slow tempo, like background music in an empty cathedral, minimal and peaceful
tracks.label: Tome of Strategies
tracks.notes: Alternate deck builder. Warmer, more intimate.

tracks.title: The Summoning Circle
tracks.style: anticipation building, two opponents about to face each other across a stone arena, low strings pulsing, tension rising slowly, medium tempo, the calm before the storm, something powerful is coming
tracks.label: The Summoning Circle
tracks.notes: Waiting for opponent/matchmaking. Building anticipation without anxiety.

tracks.title: Opening Gambit
tracks.style: a chess match begins, pieces being carefully placed, strategic and measured, controlled tension, medium tempo, each move deliberate, the board is still open, low stakes but sharp focus
tracks.label: Opening Gambit
tracks.notes: Turns 1-4. Measured, strategic, pieces being placed. Low intensity but engaging.

tracks.title: First Draw
tracks.style: the fog lifts over a battlefield at dawn, atmospheric and spacious, gentle tension, plucked strings, soft accents, a quiet scene before the armies clash, medium-slow tempo, setting the stage
tracks.label: First Draw
tracks.notes: Alternate early game. More atmospheric, setting the scene.

tracks.title: Clash of Wills
tracks.style: the battle is fully joined, two armies clashing on an open field, driving and heroic, medium-fast tempo, bold and powerful, forces colliding, the fight surges back and forth, energetic but controlled
tracks.label: Clash of Wills
tracks.notes: Turns 5-9. The battle intensifies. Creatures clashing, spells flying.

tracks.title: Arcane Escalation
tracks.style: powerful magic being unleashed, spells lighting up the sky, escalating intensity, urgent and dramatic, medium-fast tempo, arcane energy crackling, the stakes are rising with every exchange
tracks.label: Arcane Escalation
tracks.notes: Alternate midgame. More magical/arcane feeling. Spellcasting intensifies.

tracks.title: Creatures of the Aether
tracks.style: summoning massive creatures into battle, soaring and adventurous, heroic melody, the tide could turn either way, medium-fast tempo, triumphant undertones, a dragon takes flight overhead
tracks.label: Creatures of the Aether
tracks.notes: Third midgame track. More heroic/adventurous. The tide could go either way.

tracks.title: Final Reckoning
tracks.style: the final desperate assault, everything on the line, maximum intensity, fast tempo, thundering and relentless, both sides throwing everything they have, climactic and urgent, no turning back
tracks.label: Final Reckoning
tracks.notes: Turns 10+. All-out war. Life totals low, board state critical. Maximum dramatic intensity.

tracks.title: The Last Stand
tracks.style: dark and ominous, one wrong move means defeat, relentless pounding rhythm, heavy and oppressive, fast tempo, the walls are closing in, survival mode, do or die, every second counts
tracks.label: The Last Stand
tracks.notes: Alternate late game. Darker, more ominous. When defeat is possible and every draw matters.

tracks.title: Duelist's Resolve
tracks.style: steady determination, a duel between equals, balanced and versatile, medium tempo, adaptable energy that works early or late, confident but not reckless, the resolve of a seasoned warrior
tracks.label: Duelist's Resolve
tracks.notes: Phase-agnostic battlefield track. Works at any point in the game. Reliable all-rounder.

tracks.title: Triumphant Ascension
tracks.style: glorious victory, the enemy falls, triumphant fanfare, celebration and glory, uplifting and soaring, major key, short and powerful, the crowd roars, you have conquered
tracks.label: Triumphant Ascension
tracks.notes: Victory screen. Short (60-90s ideal). Triumphant, satisfying, glorious.

tracks.title: Ashes of Defeat
tracks.style: the dust settles on a lost battle, somber but dignified, a lone melody over muted strings, slow and reflective, bittersweet, not crushing — the fallen warrior will rise again
tracks.label: Ashes of Defeat
tracks.notes: Defeat screen. Short (60-90s ideal). Somber but not crushing. Dignity in defeat.

variations._comment: Tracks where generating 2+ variations is valuable for A/B selection
variations.reason: These are the highest-impact tracks. Suno generates 2 per request anyway, so we get natural variations. For these 4, consider submitting 2 requests (4 candidates) to cherry-pick the best.
